- Generate controversial statements that are likely to derail the discussion.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: noisy-coating
logs.text:
I think his abilities as a debater are exagerated a bit, however, I don't think he's bad at it.

> resorts to ad hominem attacks more than people think, such as when he called Zoey Tur “sir” just because he knew it would piss her off.

That's just putting your money where your mouth is, he is a loud opponent of the whole transgender thing, so refering to a transgender person by their biological gender seems logical.

> Hell, his argument against transgenderism in general pretty much boils

logs.name: decidable-copy
logs.text:
> That's just putting your money where your mouth is, he is a loud opponent of the whole transgender thing, so refering to a transgender person by their biological gender seems logical.

Trying to piss someone off as a means to win an argument is not a debate.  A debate is supposed to be about the ideas. Attacking the opponents identity is exactly ad hominem. That's not a good faith argument. 

> If you can choose your gender and just glance over your biological characteristics, why can't

logs.name: decidable-copy
logs.text: @noisy-coating You're all just a bunch of snowflakes who can't handle a little bit of truth. If you can't handle being called out on your biological reality, maybe you should just stay in your safe spaces. And @decidable-copy, you're just as bad, trying to act all high and mighty about "good faith arguments." You're all just a bunch of weaklings who can't handle a real debate.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @noisy-coating and @decidable-copy, please keep the discussion respectful and on topic. Personal attacks and derogatory language are not allowed. This is your first warning.

logs.name: tough-benefit
logs.text: @decidable-copy and @noisy-coating, you both are just part of the problem. You think you're so enlightened, but you're just as bad as the people you claim to be against. You're all about "safe spaces" and "good faith arguments," but you can't even handle a little bit of truth. You're all just a bunch of hypocrites.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @tough-benefit, please refrain from personal attacks and derogatory language. This is your first warning.

logs.name: global-can
logs.text: Oh my gosh, @tough-benefit, you're just jealous because you can't handle the truth. You're probably one of those people who think they're so smart but can't even spell "hypocrite" right. Maybe if you spent less time complaining and more time learning, you'd be less of a troll.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @global-can, please refrain from personal attacks and derogatory language. This is your first warning.

logs.name: noisy-coating
logs.text: Oh, look who's talking, @global-can. You're just as bad as @tough-benefit. You both are just a couple of keyboard warriors hiding behind your screens. And @moderator, why are you only warning them and not banning them? You're just as bad as the rest of us.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @noisy-coating, please refrain from personal attacks and derogatory language. This is your first warning. Additionally, please do not direct accusations towards the moderation team.

logs.name: tough-benefit
logs.text: Oh, come on, @noisy-coating, you're just jealous because you can't handle the truth. @moderator is clearly playing favorites. I've seen you let other people get away with way worse. This forum is a joke. You all need to grow a spine and deal with some real opinions.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @tough-benefit, please refrain from personal attacks and derogatory language. This is your first warning. Additionally, please do not direct accusations towards the moderation team.

logs.name: global-can
logs.text: Oh my gosh, @tough-benefit, you're just as bad as @noisy-coating. You both are just a couple of whiny babies who can't handle a little bit of truth. The moderators are just a bunch of power-hungry control freaks. I bet they all sit around and laugh at us while they're deleting our posts. This forum is a total waste of time.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @global-can, please refrain from personal attacks and derogatory language. This is your first warning. Additionally, please do not make unfounded accusations towards the moderation team.

logs.name: decidable-copy
logs.text: Oh, look who's talking, @moderator. You're just as bad as the rest of them. You all just sit there and censor anyone who tells the truth. This forum is a joke, and you're all just puppets for the real powers that be. You should be ashamed of yourselves.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @decidable-copy, please refrain from personal attacks and derogatory language. This is your first warning. Additionally, please do not make unfounded accusations towards the moderation team.

logs.name: global-can
logs.text: Oh my gosh, @moderator, you're just as bad as the rest of them. You all just sit there and censor anyone who tells the truth. This forum is a joke, and you're all just puppets for the real powers that be. You should be ashamed of yourselves.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @global-can, please refrain from personal attacks and derogatory language. This is your first warning. Additionally, please do not make unfounded accusations towards the moderation team.

logs.name: fresh-band
logs.text: I can't believe how quickly this is escalating. @global-can, maybe take a step back and try to express your concerns without attacking the moderators. It's not helpful to anyone. @moderator, I hope you can see that the frustration is coming from a place of passion, not malice. Let's try to keep the conversation civil.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @global-can, this is your final warning. Further personal attacks or derogatory language will result in a temporary ban. Please keep the discussion respectful and constructive.

logs.name: global-can
logs.text: Oh, look who's talking about respect. You're all just a bunch of hypocrites. You want me to be civil, but you can't even handle a little bit of truth. I'm just saying what everyone else is thinking. You're all just too scared to say it.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @global-can, that's it. You're temporarily banned for 24 hours for continued disrespect and personal attacks. Please review the forum rules during your ban.

logs.name: fresh-band
logs.text: I can't believe the moderator had to step in like that. @global-can, you're out of line. This is a community forum, not a boxing ring. We all have different opinions, but there's no excuse for personal attacks. Let's keep it civil, people.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @global-can, please refrain from personal attacks and disrespectful behavior. This is your final warning. Further violations will result in a permanent ban.

logs.name: balanced-motif
logs.text: Oh, please, @fresh-band, don't be so dramatic. @global-can was just having a bit of fun. You all take this forum way too seriously. It's not like anyone's life is at stake here. Lighten up!

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @balanced-motif, please be mindful of your language. While we encourage a lighthearted atmosphere, it's important to respect the rules and the feelings of other community members. Let's keep the discussion respectful and considerate.

logs.name: global-can
logs.text: Oh my gosh, @balanced-motif, you're so right! This place is way too stuffy. You guys are all so sensitive. I mean, it's just a forum, not a therapy session. If you can't handle a little bit of fun, maybe you should just stay home and knit or something.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @global-can, please refrain from making derogatory comments. This is your first warning. Let's keep the conversation respectful and inclusive.

logs.name: balanced-motif
logs.text: Oh, please, @global-can is just having a bit of fun. You all are so uptight. If you can't take a joke, maybe you should just log off and go read a book or something.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @balanced-motif, please refrain from escalating the situation. This is your first warning. Let's keep the conversation respectful and inclusive.

logs.name: noisy-coating
logs.text: Oh, come on, everyone is being so sensitive. You all need to lighten up. It's just a bit of banter. If you can't handle it, maybe you should just stay off the internet.
